issues.description: Add a button to continue with the 90 days
issues.reviewReason: Want to land this in the right spot in one pass rather than guess. Which screen shows 'the 90 days' you want a 'continue' button on, and what should the button DO? I checked the two '90-day' surfaces in the app: (1) the free-trial timeline is 30-day (Today -> Day 27 -> Day 30), not 90; (2) the AI Overview has a 90-day reporting range (Tip / Next 90-day Focus) but it's read-only text, no flow to 'continue'. So I'm not sure which '90 days' this means — a 90-day plan/program? a goal projection? A quick screenshot of the screen (or the route) + what tapping the button should do (start/continue a 90-day plan, etc.) lets me build it right the first time.
issues.reviewReply: the target completion should says continue button if it's more than 1% weight loss per week

issues.description: Fix the notification cutoff for badges on all badges
issues.reviewReason: Could you attach a screenshot of the badge notification cut off? There are two different cutoffs and each needs a different fix: (1) the badge NAME text truncated with an ellipsis (horizontal clip), or (2) the whole notification clipped under the status bar / camera island at the top (vertical clip) — the latter would affect every badge equally, which matches your 'on all badges'. The in-app badge toast already has a top safe-area guard, so if it's still clipping at the top I'd need your device model to tune it. A screenshot tells me which one + lets me verify the fix.
